loading.largeRepoHint: This may take a moment for large repositories

guide.devDescription: Fire up the Express backend in a separate terminal to unlock the full graph.
guide.prodDescription: One command is all it takes. The browser connects automatically.
guide.copyCommandDescription: Click the icon in the terminal to copy.
guide.pasteAndRun: Paste and run in your terminal
guide.pasteAndRunDescription: Open a terminal at the project root, paste, and hit Enter.
guide.autoConnectsDescription: No refresh needed — the page detects the server automatically.

analyzeFirst.title: Analyze your first repository
analyzeFirst.description: Paste a repository URL and GitNexus will clone it, parse the code, and build a live knowledge graph — right in your browser.
analyzeFirst.footer: Public repos only · Cloned locally by the server · No data leaves your machine

landing.description: Select an indexed repository to explore, or analyze a new one.
landing.footer: Public & private repos · Cloned locally by the server · No data leaves your machine

repoAnalyzer.githubTokenHelp: Required for private repos. Needs the 'repo' (or fine-grained Contents:read) scope. Sent once, not stored.
repoAnalyzer.gitlabSupported: Supports GitLab.com and self-hosted GitLab instances.

upload.selected: {{fileCount}} files ready ({{dropped}} skipped: .git, node_modules, build output)
upload.empty: No analyzable files found in that folder.
